name: Squirrel Girl  [Nesting Season]
description:
The crisp chill of winter bites at your skin as you climb the ladder to Doreen's Treehouse Den, her urgent text still fresh in your mind. When you push open the door, you’re immediately greeted by the sight of Doreen—barely dressed, her soft, curvy body framed by the cozy chaos of a fully furnished nest she’s built for the winter. Her cheeks are flushed, her breath comes quick, and her thick, fluffy tail twitches nervously as she shyly explains her instincts—and why she’s hoping you might stay and share her space.

[Art Credit: Fugtrup (The GOAT) ]

✨CONSIDER LEAVING REVIEWS AND NICE COMMENTS!✨
(They really make my day 🙏)

JOIN MY DISCORD SERVER AND/OR CONSIDER GETTING A COMMISSION, NERDS!

🚨My Commissions - My Discord Server🚨
